target:
# Try to get the PT3 screenshots - the page had thumbnails but let me look for full screenshots
# Let's navigate to the PT3 screenshots page and see if there are full-size links
curl -sL "https://web.archive.org/web/20080604041217/http://www.pokertracker.com/products/PT3/screenshots.php" -o /tmp/pt3-screenshots.html && wc -c /tmp/pt3-screenshots.html && grep -i "pt3_\|screenshot\|img src\|\.jpg\|\.png\|href" /tmp/pt3-screenshots.html | grep -v "archive.org\|logo\|banner\|nav\|icon\|facebook\|twi
